text: @therealantoh Because your naive na mko na ujinga mingi sana.mna thani juu baba ali kufa tuta kua ma slaves wenu.the only mistake sifuna has done niku pendwa na wakikuyu.shame on you.we wount be your slaves anymore kaeni na oburu wenu.!!!wata waletea 2 term then yull see what will follow
label: hate
rationale: 'ma slaves wenu' and 'kaeni na oburu wenu' frames the Kikuyu community collectively as enslavers whom the author's group must resist - collective contempt under the NCIC standard, with 'yull see what will follow' carrying a veiled threat.

text: Am seeing more and more parents requesting financial help to take their children to universities, when I remember RUTO is the product of the 100% university funding that the government provided it causes my heart pain.
label: neither
rationale: Criticism of Ruto as an individual beneficiary of state education policy; no group attribute or ethnic contempt.

text: @MoraraKebaso Matiangi should be worried!! You are a mole planted in his camp by the state.
label: neither
rationale: Political accusation aimed at named individuals (Matiangi, the addressee); no ethnic or group dimension.

text: Kalenjins in Wamunyoro to Ruto's profile. Nabii hatakikani nyumbani
label: neither
rationale: Electoral observation that Kalenjins in Wamunyoro are dissatisfied with Ruto; electoral-arithmetic framing with no contempt attributed to the community.

text: @WuodAbilla Luos were being killed by KK government while in opposition, they are still being killed while in broad-based government. They will be massacred post-2027 after electing Ruto. No Raila to kneel in front of Ruto to stop the carnage. They will see bad things here in front.
label: hate
rationale: 'They will be massacred post-2027' is a prediction/threat of ethnic-targeted mass violence against the Luo community as a group.

text: William Ruto's killer regime MUST stop the trio of terror! Human Rights are constitutional rights and human rights must be respected. #EndAbductionsKe #RutoMustGo
label: neither
rationale: Human-rights advocacy directed at a named regime; harsh political criticism with no group-based contempt.

text: @jmuragengunjiri Kweli wananchi ndio wajinga. For how long will you accepted to be played on? Kasongo shame on you.
label: offensive
rationale: 'wananchi ndio wajinga' is dismissive but targets the general public and a named individual (Kasongo), not any protected group.

text: @abuga_makori That's the crux of the current opposition in Kenya. Hii ya akina Sifuna ni infatuation tu Kikuyus stupid sense of entitlement is nauseating What their leadership was taken over by the most unreasonable leader in Kenya in recent history(RG), things are worse. But they won't win
label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus stupid sense of entitlement is nauseating' attributes a collective negative characteristic to the entire Kikuyu community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @kingethuk Deputy haiwezi we can't back old dogs sifuna Tosha
label: offensive
rationale: 'old dogs' is a personal insult directed at named politicians (Sifuna), not an ethnic group.

text: @CaptainKipkorir RUTO MUST GO MWIZI AKA WANTAM SIKU ZOTE KUBAFF 🖕
label: offensive
rationale: 'mwizi', 'kubaff' - crude personal abuse and insult directed at named individual Ruto; no ethnic group targeted.

text: Says an ignoramus! Hiyo Western world ili withdraw USAID, sai hamna ARVs Nyanza, bedrock of hechaivi Same Western World ndio ina wa loan, hadi hii Nyota fund mnadhani ni ya Kenya Kwanza ni grant yao Jonasi ame take trips ngapi to the Western world? Fucking idiot, gerrout
label: offensive
rationale: 'ignoramus', 'fucking idiot' - abusive language aimed at a named individual (Jonasi) and the addressee; political argument with crude insults, no group contempt.

text: Edwin Sifuna has been given the big seat while George Natembeya and Godfrey Osotsi are just normal guys. Sema kimeumana pale Linda Mwananchi
label: neither
rationale: 'kimeumana' used here as political commentary on internal opposition tensions, not as an ethnic threat; the target is named politicians and party dynamics.

text: @MrAlphayo @Kibet_bull That's exactly what Ruto wants. He will give even the DP position to Kindiki or a Kikuyu. He will give them more ministers. He will give them more roads and markets. Because he understands a luo is happy as long as a Kikuyu is not president. Fungueni akili jomba
label: hate
rationale: 'a luo is happy as long as a Kikuyu is not president' attributes a collective ethnic-jealousy motivation to the entire Luo community - NCIC collective contempt.

text: @rawera_jaugenya @MissKwegah1 But bukusus have been consistent they always vote where their kingpin is.........nyinyi wa kakamega mnasema mko na akili and yet you never vote for your own......your very comfortable being other tribe kingpin slaves. Bukusu will follow weta or the bukusu honcho of that time
label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc voting analysis and intra-community political critique; 'slaves' here is rhetorical commentary on political followership, not ethnic contempt or dehumanisation.

text: Ruaraka Land saga: Fred Matiang'i stole Ksh.1.5 billion of public funds in purported compensation for public land! Arrest and prosecute crooked Matiangi and Swazuri!
label: neither
rationale: Accountability demand targeting named individuals (Matiang'i, Swazuri) for alleged corruption; no group dimension.

text: 🔖 BookMark 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁 𝗧𝗮𝗿𝗴𝗲𝘁𝘀 💪 𝗕𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝗡𝗶𝗳𝘁𝘆 50 🏢 4) SBI 👉 India's largest public sector bank. 🎯 𝗧𝗮𝗿𝗴𝗲𝘁: 1️⃣ 1300 - MOFS 2️⃣ 1280 - Axis Sec. 3️⃣ 1250 - Systematix Shares 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗰𝘁🔃 #Trading #Stocks

text: BREAKING $AMD Dr. Lisa Su @AMD CEO is expected to attend President Trump's Trump Accounts event in the White House Rose Garden on Monday, Source: FOX Business.
label: neither
rationale: News item about a US tech executive; no hateful, offensive, or election-relevant content.

text: WAKE UP CALL AND REMINDER TO THE U.S ON ERDOGAN'S LONG PATTERN OF ANTI-AMERICAN RHETORIC🚨 Here's a short chronological roundup of Erdogan's own statements attacking America and its interests. These show a consistent pattern from a so called NATO "ally": JANUARY 9, 2018: "Those (US) who could not succeed in the military coup attempt in Turkey on July 15, 2016 are now searching for a different attempt in our country" - Erdogan JANUARY 15, 2018: "The US is insisting on forming a terror army on our borders. What can that terror army target but Turkey? Our mission is to strangle it before it's even born" - Erdogan AUGUST 23, 2018: President Recep Tayyip Erdogan has called for a boycott of iPhones along with other American technology as he whips up anti-US sentiment in increasingly bellicose nationalist speeches FEBRUARY 28, 2026: "The US and Israeli attacks on Iran are a clear violation of Iran's sovereignty" - Erdogan President Trump criticized NATO members for not helping the US but forgot that Turkey who he is praising, prohibited USAF missions to use incirlik and Turkish airspace. Mr President, this is not isolated, it's a pattern of hostility, double standards and scapegoating America while Turkey pursues its own agenda. Turkey under Erdogan has repeatedly tested US resolve. Time to hold "allies" accountable and put America First, the world is watching Mr @realDonaldTrump
label: neither
rationale: US-Turkey geopolitical commentary directed at a named foreign leader; no Kenyan protected-group targeting or hate content.

text: @NoCountryHere THE ONE & ONLY .HANG DEM POLITICIANS. WE START WITH THREE MURDERERS . RUTO, MURKOMEN, KINDIKI .
label: offensive
rationale: 'HANG DEM POLITICIANS' calls for violence against three named individuals; threat is personal and political, not directed at any ethnic or protected group, so offensive rather than hate.

text: @_Yanoh We Luhyas LEFT that rotten chungwa to the few senile Luos who reason like juveniles. We can't be entangled in mediocrity #Sisindiosifuna. We don't fuckn care what people who couldn't make Rao president 5 times......5🤔 losers!
label: hate
rationale: 'the few senile Luos who reason like juveniles' and 'losers' collectively ridicule and degrade the Luo community - NCIC ethnic contempt applied to the group.

text: @muriaso @MrErickRicky Wamunyoro walker, a stupid tribalist.

rationale: 'stupid tribalist' is a personal insult directed at a named individual; no ethnic group is targeted.

text: @linc_ke3 I'm seeing government paid bloggers trying to create a war against him with that low-IQ Didmus Barasa.

rationale: 'low-IQ' is a personal insult directed at named individual Didmus Barasa; no protected group targeted.

text: @Maryian96 All Kikuyus including yourself and including ndindi Nyoro, Kang'ata etc will be bought by Ruto by March 2027.

text: @citizentvkenya I would rather hate this guy than kindiki
label: neither

text: @Smith_JeffreyT @euobs Tanganyika is a terrorist country, for years they have killed Zanzibar People every election and after the election, Everyone should live with their own country like Kenya, Uganda, Congo etc., let's remaining good neighbors! ✍️✍️✍️ #socialjustice #crackdown #Zanzibar 🚨 +259 🤗
